plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-178 RP05.P01.M08.S06-RP05.P02.M07.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

worktree_transition_policy.dirty_work_boundary: Unrelated existing web/UI and planning dirty or untracked files are preserved and not included in CP00-177.
